title: vice versa.
content:
vice versa.

You
What do people do when they stream live?

John Monforte
What I believe you should also consider is how to create a website that incorporates this streaming content and link it to generate excitement and attract viewers. This will be the most crucial aspect.

You
So

John Monforte
the process is happening on the blockchain as it unfolds.

You
And

John Monforte
the chain of blocks. Yes, it is simply a chain of blocks. This process occurs continuously, but

You
what is the actual coin you prefer?

John Monforte
I am not certain. There are 100 coins generated daily.

You
Okay.

John Monforte
I cannot recall the specific coin you desired.

You
And who were the two individuals, Charlie Kirk and who?

John Monforte
I am not aware of their names. I was merely considering Charlie Kirk and the prime minister of
context: From document: Contact John Monforte — chunk 2 (chunk 2/6)
